title: Valid Palindrome
description: Given a lowercase string x containing only alphabetic characters (with no spaces), return True if it is a palindrome, False otherwise. A string is a palindrome if it reads the same forward and backward. For instance, 'radar' is a palindrome while 'python' is not
inputFormat: A single lowercase string containing only alphabetic characters (with no spaces)
outputFormat: Boolean: True if x is palindrome, otherwise False
hint: Use two pointers, one at the beginning and one at the end of the string, and compare characters as you move them towards each other.
